title: Activity Types
subtitle: Create and publish reusable activity blueprints for slot layouts, slot metadata, and application forms.
create_subtitle: Start a new activity type draft and define the blueprint that groups will use.
edit_subtitle: Update the draft blueprint and publish when it is ready.
empty: No activity types have been created yet.
empty_filtered: No activity types match your search.
search_placeholder: Search name, slug, tag, or difficulty
delete_confirm: Delete this activity type? This will archive it.

form.error_title: This draft still has a few issues to fix.

general.title: General
general.subtitle: Set the core identity and translated copy for this activity type.
general.slug_help: Used internally and in URLs. Lowercase letters, numbers, and dashes only.
general.name: Localized Name
general.name_help: The English name is required. Other locales can be added now or later.
general.description_help: Short explanation shown to admins and eventually to group managers.
general.description_placeholder: Describe what this activity type is for

small_image.label: Small Image
small_image.help: Optional portrait card image. Recommended ratio is about 1:1.7. The preview shows letterboxing without cropping.

banner_image.label: Banner Image
banner_image.help: Optional wide banner image. Recommended ratio is about 3:1. The preview shows letterboxing without cropping.

general.difficulty_help: The broad content difficulty used for run discovery and filtering.
general.default_min_item_level_help: Optional default copied into new runs. Moderators can override or disable it per run.
general.fflogs_zone_id_help: Optional zone identifier used when this activity type needs FF Logs-backed data lookups.
general.tags_help: Optional freeform tags used for search and filtering.
general.tags_placeholder: Type a tag and press enter
general.active_help: Inactive activity types stay in the admin history but should not be used for new activities.

layout.title: Layout
layout.subtitle: Define the slot groups this activity will generate.
layout.group_hint: A group can represent a party, alliance, squad, or any slot bucket you need.
layout.group_label_help: This label will be shown in the activity UI.
layout.layout_preset_help: Choose the generated party structure. Slots are still created the same way behind the scenes.
layout.composition_preset_help: Choose the advisory per-slot hint copied onto each generated party.

slot_fields.title: Slot Fields
slot_fields.subtitle: Define metadata captured for each slot when organizers assign characters.

application.title: Application Questions
application.subtitle: Define what applicants need to submit for this activity type.

roster_summary.title: Roster Summary Presets
roster_summary.subtitle: Define reusable composition targets that moderators can later choose from while reviewing a roster.
roster_summary.preset_hint: Use presets for different composition lenses like minimum, relaxed, or optimized group setups.
roster_summary.label: Localized Preset Label
roster_summary.label_help: This is the name moderators will see when choosing which summary preset to view.
roster_summary.description_help: Optional supporting context shown alongside this preset later.
roster_summary.description_placeholder: Explain what this composition preset is aiming for
roster_summary.requirements_subtitle: Each requirement tracks one item, target count, and the part of the roster it should be checked against.
roster_summary.requirement_hint: Keep these focused on the counts moderators actually need to sanity-check quickly.
roster_summary.requirement_scope_all_hint: This requirement will be checked against the full roster.

progress.title: Progress Tracking
progress.subtitle: Define the milestones groups can report when they finish an activity.
progress.milestone_hint: Use one milestone per boss, phase, or checkpoint you want to track later.
progress.label: Localized Milestone Label
progress.label_help: This label is shown when groups record or review progress.
progress.fflogs_subtitle: Map each milestone to either a full encounter or to a specific phase inside that encounter.
progress.empty_description: Add milestones if this activity type should support end-of-run progress tracking.

prog_points.title: Prog Points
prog_points.subtitle: Define simpler progress checkpoints that can be referenced by activity instances and future statistics.
prog_points.item_hint: Use these for named progression checkpoints like bridges, puzzle, or cleanup stages.
prog_points.label: Localized Prog Point Label
prog_points.label_help: This label is shown anywhere the activity references these prog points later.
prog_points.empty_description: Add prog points if this activity type needs named checkpoints beyond FF Logs milestone mapping.

schema.field_hint: Use stable keys and translated labels so this schema can power multiple UIs.
schema.label: Localized Label
schema.label_help: This is the main label shown to users.
schema.help_text_help: Optional supporting text shown below the field.
schema.options_subtitle: Only needed when the source is set to static options.

summary.title: Draft Summary
summary.subtitle: A quick snapshot of the blueprint you are building.
